seeds.value: Define your severity levels here. Example: Critical: data loss or outage. High: major feature broken. Medium: degraded UX. Low: cosmetic issue.
seeds.description: Criteria for classifying bug severity levels

seeds.value: Define team routing rules here. Example: frontend bugs to UI team, API bugs to backend team, infra bugs to SRE team.
seeds.description: Rules for routing triaged bugs to the right team
